rules.rule_text:
title: Chopper Webshell Process Pattern
id: fa3c117a-bc0d-416e-a31b-0c0e80653efb
status: test
description: Detects patterns found in process executions cause by China Chopper like
  tiny (ASPX) webshells
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/09/30/analyzing-attacks-using-the-exchange-vulnerabilities-cve-2022-41040-and-cve-2022-41082/
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), MSTI (query)
date: 2022-10-01
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1505.003
- attack.t1018
- attack.t1033
- attack.t1087
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_origin:
  - Image|endswith: \w3wp.exe
  - ParentImage|endswith: \w3wp.exe
  selection_cmdline:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - '&ipconfig&echo'
    - '&quser&echo'
    - '&whoami&echo'
    - '&c:&echo'
    - '&cd&echo'
    - '&dir&echo'
    - '&echo [E]'
    - '&echo [S]'
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
